license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.4vygw7w
title: RNA Isolation from Plant Tissue Protocol 3: CTAB-PVP Method
author: Beijing Genomics Institute

steps_raw.instruction: Grind tissue to a powder in liquid nitrogen.
Add 200 mg – 500 mg of ground, frozen tissue to 3.0 mL of pre-heated extraction buffer in a 5 ml tube.
Vortex the tube until the tissue is mixed with the buffer.
Incubate the tube at 65 °C for 00:30:00 (min), vortexing briefly ( 00:00:15 ) every 2–3 min during the incubation.
Aliquot the mixture into four 2 ml RNase free tubes, 1 mL each tube.
Spin the tube at for 00:10:00 in a microcentrifuge. All of the insoluble matter should form a pellet at the bottom of the tube. When used for algae the centrifugation was performed at .
Pour the supernatant into a new 2 ml RNase free tube. When used for algae, 15 ml tubes were used.
Add equal volume of 24:1 chloroform:isoamyl alcohol to fill the tube.
Vortex tubes until the phases mix and appear cloudy.
Spin the tubes at for 00:10:00 in a microcentrifuge. When used for algae the centrifugation was performed at .
Transfer the upper, aqueous phase to new 2 ml RNase free tubes. When used for algae, 15 ml tubes were used.
Transfer the upper, aqueous phase to new 2 ml RNase free tubes.
Spin the tubes at for 00:20:00 in a microcentrifuge.
Add 1 mL 75 % ethanol to the pellet.
Spin the tube at maximum speed (> ) for 00:05:00 in a microcentrifuge.
Repeat steps 14 and 15 one more time. go to step #14
Open cap and air-dry the pellet.
Add 30 µL RNase free water to dissolve the pellet.
Combine all 4 tubes into 1 tube.
Add equal volume of 25:24:1 acid phenol:chloroform:isoamyl alcohol to the tube.
Vortex the tubes until the phases mix and appear cloudy.
Spin the tube at for 00:10:00 .
Transfer the upper, aqueous phase to a new 2 ml RNase free tube.
Vortex the tubes until the phases mix and appear cloudy.
Spin the tube at for 00:10:00 in a microcentrifuge.
Transfer the upper, aqueous phase to a new 2 ml RNase free tube.
Spin the tube at for 00:20:00 in a microcentrifuge.
Add 1 mL 75 % cooled ethanol to the pellet.
Centrifuge at 4 °C for 00:05:00 at .
Wash the pellet twice with cooled 75 % DEPC-ethanol.
Add 30 µL RNase-free water to dissolve the pellet.
Treat RNA with DNase I as per supplier’s protocols.
Repeat step 7 to 9 one more time. go to step #7
Incubate at 20 °C – 25 °C for 00:05:00 .
Add 1/3 volume of 10 Molarity (M) LiCl to each tube.
Mix and let stand at 4 °C for 06:00:00 – 08:00:00 or overnight to precipitate RNA.
Decant the supernatant, taking care not to lose the pellet.
Decant the supernatant carefully.
Then add 70 µL SSTE buffer to each tube.
Then incubate at 20 °C for 00:05:00 .
Add equal volume of 24:1 chloroform:isoamyl alcohol to the tube.
Then incubate at 20 °C for 00:05:00 .
Add 2 volumes of cooled 100 % ethanol, 1/10 volumes of NaAc (pH 5.2) and 2 µL glycogen.
Mix and incubate at -20 °C for 02:00:00 .
Then decant the supernatant, taking care not to lose the pellet.
Leave at 20 °C for 00:03:00 .
Decant the liquid carefully, taking care not to lose the pellet.
Briefly centrifuge to collect the residual liquid and remove it with a pipette.
Open cap and air-dry the pellet.
